title: EARLY CHILDHOOD AND ELEMENTARY SCHOOL PROGRAMS - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS RIVER ELEMENTARY EARLY CHILDHOOD AND ELEMENTARY SCHOOL PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides after school activities, parent child play groups, school readiness, and parenting classes to children and families. 301 NE 2nd Avenue Estacada, OR 97023 Eligibility: Ages 0-8 and their families Hours: Varies by activity Email (503) 630-8552 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 630-8552 Main phone Main phone (503) 630-8552 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email to register for activities. Families can also be referred by counselors or other agencies FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Estacada Services: Children's Play Groups Parent/Child Activity Groups Parenting Skills Classes School Readiness Programs Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY RESOURCE NAVIGATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLACKAMAS RIVER ELEMENTARY
